🛑 **STOP.** Do not file public issues for security vulnerabilities.

Email: `security@<TBD-your-domain>`

We aim to respond within 48 hours and disclose within 90 days of a fix being available.

If you're sure your issue is NOT a security report, close this and use the bug or feature template instead.
